title: Blueno Falls — Part 5
description: Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Blueno, Spandam, Nico Robin. Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.

dialogue.text: Let's gooooo... USoooopp gallery palters pirates
